title: MixSets
description: A Minecraft Client-side Fixes and Features mod, that just makes sense
body:
# Bring Minecraft Fixes and Tools on a Whole New Level with... ↴

![MixSets Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/156da4233766a7261289033db037af050a4bf2b0.png)

## MixSets is the Mod that's providing a few client-side fixes and functions to improve the gameplay/other game aspects.

It is fully configurable and will have more and more features and fixes in future updates! Please note that I'm new to Minecraft Modding and the Mod has just started itself existing, so please do not expect a lot of features and updates that quickly. Thank you.

There are no plans to port this to Forge/NeoForge. In general, I will not prevent you from forking this project and trying to port it to Forge/NeoForge.

### Here's some realized functions and fixes ↴
- [Greetings Messages](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixsets) - Adds a multi-line message greeting when enter a World/Server
- [FPS Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixsets) - Literally what it says
- [Title Clearing Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/title-fix-mod) - Fixes the issue where title overlays bleed into other Worlds/Servers when quickly Leaving/Joining
- [Centered Book](https://modrinth.com/mod/fixbookgui) - Fixes for Vanilla book position
- [ToolTip Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltipfix) - Cuts tooltips tabs that are too large.
- [Fast Server IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/serverpingerfixer) - Improves pinging speed of the multiplayer server list
- [Server List Selection Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/list-entry-highlight-fix) - Fixes few pixels of misalignment of the highlight border
- [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) - Adds a numerical ping display to the Player Tablist
- [Crosshair Position Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/centered-crosshair) - Centers the crosshair to be perfectly in the middle of the screen
- [Disable Menu FPS Limit](https://modrinth.com/mod/smoothmenu-refabricated) - Removes the Main Menu's FPS limit
- [Entity Mouse Moving Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/ridingmousefix) - Fixes angle and input lag of Mouse Move when Riding on Entities
- [Disable Fade Transitions](https://modrinth.com/mod/fadeless) - Literally what it says (disabled by default)
- [Remove Block Outline](https://modrinth.com/mod/removeblockoutline) - Literally what it says (disabled by default)

<details>
<summary>Future Plans</summary>
  
• [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) - Literally what it says, up to 16k+ messages stored in chat
  
• [Inventory Move](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove) - Literally what it says, allows to move while in some sort of Minecraft GUIs

• [Title Size Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/title-fixer) - Literally what it says, fixes the size of Titles so its not going of the screen

• [Durability ToolTip](https://modrinth.com/mod/durability-tooltip) - Shows you the durability of an item

• [No Resource-pack Warnings](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings) - Literally what it says, disables the Resource-Pack non-compactable Version Warning

• [Click Through](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickthrough) - Click through Signs and Item Frames to Chests, Barrels, and so on

• [Working Chat Links](https://modrinth.com/mod/restore-chat-links) - Clickable links in Chat

• [Third-Person Maps](https://modrinth.com/mod/third-person-maps) - Render Minecraft Maps in Third-Person perspective

• [No Rain/Snow Up than Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/head-in-the-clouds) - Make it not Rain or Snow over the cloud level

• [Items Model Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - Fixes gaps in Block Models and Item Models

• [Fast World Quit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit) - Lets you return to the Title Screen early while your world is still saving in the background

• [Idle Performance](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background or idle

• [Fishing Rod Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/fishing-rod-fix) - This mod provides fix for old fishing line rendering bug

• [Linux Chat Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/mc122477fix-re-updated) - Fixes writing a "t" into chat window using Linux, MacOS, and so on
</details>

### You may ask..
Why does this even exist? Why don't I just install all the mods separately? The answer is simple - The problem is in the extra load on the CPU and the loss of framerate. The more mod .jar files you have, the more they load your minecraft and impact on your framerate, because each of them is initialized separately, and it also means that they work separately, which can affect badly on the system. And also mods like that often have a lot of unnecessary functions in config/itself cod. And MixSets is here for solve this problem. It loads all mods at once of start of the game, and the mods which is disabled in config, wouldn't even loaded up at all. Also, the mod config itself is very simple and does not have unnecessary functions. That's it. Thanks!
